name: Urban Flight Safety Configuration
description: You are a Drone Safety Officer. A vehicle is being prepared for a rooftop delivery in a high-magnetic-interference urban environment. Read the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/urban_ops_brief.txt and configure the 7 specified ArduCopter failsafe and estimation parameters. You must update GPS tolerances, disable all magnetometers, change the EKF heading source, and shorten the ground auto-disarm delay. Ensure all parameters are written to the flight controller before takeoff.
